message:
fix(policy): handle quoted values in trauma bypass prefix detection

Improve has_trauma_bypass_prefix() to use VAR_ASSIGN regex instead of
naive split_whitespace() token parsing. Now correctly recognizes:
- FT_BYPASS_TRAUMA="1" (double-quoted)
- FT_BYPASS_TRAUMA='1' (single-quoted)
- FOO="with spaces" FT_BYPASS_TRAUMA=1 cargo test (leading var
  assignments with spaces in values)

Two new test cases for quoted value variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
